holdings.infoBox: QLC is an equity ETF with a total of 181 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.35%, Apple at 7.14%, Alphabet at 4.25%, Alphabet at 3.77%, and Microsoft at 3.52%.

overview.description: The FlexShares US Quality Large Cap Index Fund (QLC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of the highest quality large-caps in the US market. QLC was launched on Sep 24, 2015 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Northern Trust Quality Large Cap Total Return
